problem: Why do all animals sleep — what is the essential biological function?
hypothesis: If Sleep-dependent memory consolidation in hippocampus is applied to essential, then function improves will occur because prior evidence supports this pathway.

experiment.protocol: EEG/MEG signal analysis with 14 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: To know that you do not know is the best. — Lao Tzu
